base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of iggy_larry_boss_room — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Iggy's/Larry's Castle boss-arena (tilting platform over lava). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Iggy's/Larry's Castle boss-arena (tilting platform over lava)
